message:
✨ Add llm-d tags to widget tooltips and remove hardcoded widget URLs (#1645)

Two fixes:

1. Widget nightly E2E tooltips now show llm-d component tags (cyan) and
   other image tags (orange) matching the dashboard card's popup.

2. All widget URLs are now dynamic instead of hardcoded:
   - Übersicht widget template injects window.location.origin at
     download/copy time (works for localhost, cluster, console.kubestellar.io)
   - Exported card widgets use the user-configured API endpoint origin
   - Removed hardcoded :5174 port derivation in codeGenerator
   - All widget API calls include ?source=ubersicht-widget for attribution
   - All click-through URLs include UTM campaign params for GA4

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
